/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_physics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_movement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/gravity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/movement.cpp.o -o tests  _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Main.a _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a
